title: Love Express. The Disappearance of Walerian Borowczyk
original_title: Love Express. The Disappearance of Walerian Borowczyk
overview: A documentary celebrating the work of Walerian Borowczyk, a director of unparalleled sensitivity, revered in the 1970s, who was later labeled as a maker of erotic movies.
